headline: V.F. Corp. Set to Report Q1 Earnings: What Investors Should Expect
summary: VFC heads into fiscal Q1 with growth brands and margin gains offset by Vans softness, higher spending and macro pressures, despite an improved loss outlook.

headline: Reynolds Consumer Products to Post Q2 Earnings: Key Things to Note
summary: REYN heads into second-quarter earnings with expectations for modest growth, supported by brand strength, productivity initiatives and pricing actions.
